info.name: School Management API
info.description: Node.js + Express + MySQL APIs for managing schools with proximity sorting.

variable.description: Change to your deployed URL in production

request.description: Check if the API server is running.
Adds a new school to the database. All fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created
422 Validation Error

request.description: Tests validation — empty name and out-of-range latitude should return 422.
Returns all schools sorted by distance (km) from the given coordinates. Uses the Haversine formula.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "user_location": { "latitude": 18.5204, "longitude": 73.8567 },
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 2,
      "name": "The Orchid School",
      "address": "Baner, Pune",
      "latitude": 18.559,
      "longitude": 73.7868,
      "created_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "distance_km": 7.83
    },
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "DPS Pune",
      "address": "Lohegaon, Pune",
      "latitude": 18.5793,
      "longitude": 73.9089,
      "created_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "distance_km": 8.12
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Tests validation — non-numeric latitude should return 422.
